case_title: SARAH LEWIS VS. TRADER JOE'S COMPANY

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-08-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TRADER JOE'S COMPANY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SHARA FORDYCE, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. FILED BY DEFENDANT TRADER JOE'S COMPANY
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEWIS, SARAH AS TO DEFENDANT TRADER JOE'S COMPANY
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LEWIS, SARAH AS TO DEFENDANT TRADER JOE'S COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-12-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF SARAH LEWIS IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT TRADE JOE'S COMPANY IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SARAH FORDYCE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
